violations.text: The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
The handles on the hot hold empanada machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2026
The walk in freezer refrigeration unit was observed as an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026

The floor behind the kitchen serving area is in poor repair. The floor in the meat walk in cooler was observed with broken tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer and can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer and can opener were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
The table located in the prep area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The hood system in the kitchen area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Establishment is to clean hood system. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024

Raw animal foods (such as) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrective Action - Raw animal foods were moved to bottom shelf. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the fridge in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. The glass on one of the meat counter doors was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
The floor behind the meat counter has areas of low grout and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and meat prep area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Beef case 2 was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrective action - Establishment has placed a service call to have equipment fixed. Establishment to send a photo of working equipment to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

Food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen and in the walk in freezers. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
The 3 bay sink in the meat prep roomn unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The floor in front of the meat counter area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor behind the meat counter is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The coving and door in the cold hold meat room area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023
